languages.text: "Шерин, как же вы меня напугали! Больше так не делайте. Но раз уж все равно сделали... Каков он? Плод?"

traits.locale_text: "Шерин, как же вы меня напугали! Больше так не делайте. Но раз уж все равно сделали... Каков он? Плод?"
"Шерин, как же вы меня напугали! Больше так не делайте. Но раз уж все равно сделали... Каков он? Плод?"

languages.text: "You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"
languages.original_text: "Шерин, как же вы меня напугали! Больше так не делайте. Но раз уж все равно сделали... Каков он? Плод?"

traits.locale_text: "Captain, you have me quite a fright here! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"
"Captain, you have me quite a fright here! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"
"You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"

languages.text: "Du hast mich ganz schön erschreckt, Shereen! Mach das nie wieder. Aber da du es bereits getan hast... Wie war es denn so? Die Frucht, meine ich?"
languages.original_text: "You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"

languages.text: "Tu m'as fait une sacrée frayeur, Shereen ! Ne recommencez jamais. Mais puisque vous l'avez déjà fait... Qu'est-ce que c'était ? Le fruit, je veux dire ?"
languages.original_text: "You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"

languages.text: "你吓到我了，希琳！别再这么做了但既然你已经做了...是什么感觉？我是说水果？"
languages.original_text: "You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"

languages.text: "¡Me has dado un buen susto, Shereen! No vuelvas a hacerlo. Pero ya que lo has hecho... ¿Cómo era? ¿La fruta, quiero decir?"
languages.original_text: "You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"

languages.text: "あなたには恐れ入ったわ、シャリーン！二度とやらないで。でも、もうやったんだから...どんな味だった？果物は？
languages.original_text: "You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"

languages.text: "Beni çok korkuttun, Shereen! Bir daha asla yapma. Ama zaten yaptığına göre... Nasıl bir şeydi? Yani meyve?"
languages.original_text: "You have me quite a fright, shereen! Never do it again. But since you already did... What was it like? The fruit, I mean?"
